title: Verify retained generation and idempotent replay
preconditions: Owner-only retained storage is empty and coherent producer evidence is fixed.
steps: Run ordinary Generate, then Retain with actor, reason, and key; retry identical input; reuse the key with changed input; correct producer state after retention and read the snapshot.
expected: Generate writes nothing; Retain stores exactly one immutable complete snapshot; identical retry returns it; changed input conflicts; later corrections do not change stored content.
